display.purpose: Page heading. Home greeting, settings page title.

headline.purpose: KPI hero values, brand panel hero on auth.

label.purpose: Section eyebrows, card headers, field labels. The most-used token in the system.

score.purpose: Match scores in match detail view only. The only place 700 weight appears.

shadows.name: shadow-card
shadows.purpose: Default card. Reads as a slight lift, not a drop shadow.

shadows.name: shadow-card-emphasis
shadows.purpose: Earned emphasis: active plan card, hovered KPI tiles.

shadows.name: shadow-card-raised
shadows.purpose: Activity feed, content-heavy cards that need to feel like a discrete object.

shadows.name: shadow-floating
shadows.purpose: Dark floating UI on the processing toast.

shadows.name: shadow-cta
shadows.purpose: Subtle blue glow under primary CTAs.

motion.name: ease-primary
motion.purpose: Default custom easing for cards, fades, slides.

motion.name: ease-spring
motion.purpose: Header transitions, layout shifts. Reads as spring without bounce.

motion.name: duration-reveal
motion.purpose: Larger reveals, chart animations, completion ring sweeps.

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.description: Action button used as the main affordance on every form and modal footer.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; background: #3B82F6; color: #FFFFFF; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(57,134,243,0.25); transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #2563EB; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(59,130,246,0.40); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #F7F7F7; color: #888888; box-shadow: none; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Pill Button
components.description: Quiet secondary action. Used for filter chips, segmented toggles, and ghost CTAs in settings and the upload modal.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 14px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #525252; border: 1px solid #EAECF0; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.5px; line-height: 1; transition: color 200ms, border-color 200ms, background-color 200ms; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #3B82F6; border-color: #3B82F6; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(59,130,246,0.40); }

components.name: Underline Input
components.description: Canonical input pattern. Eyebrow label above, transparent input, hairline rule below. Rule grows to 2px Signal Blue on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input-label { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2.5px; color: #AAAAAA; } .ds-input-control { width: 100%; background: transparent; border: none; outline: none; padding: 0 0 10px 0; font-size: 14px; color: #0D0D0D; } .ds-input-control::placeholder { color: #AAAAAA; } .ds-input-rule { display: block; height: 1px; width: 100%; background: #F3F3F3; transition: height 300ms cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94), background-color 300ms cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94); } .ds-input:hover .ds-input-rule { background: #E5E5EA; } .ds-input:focus-within .ds-input-rule { height: 2px; background: #3B82F6; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Default card surface. Flat at rest, promotes to shadow-card-emphasis on hover or selection.
components.html:
Recent Match

Cardinal Invitational

Defeated Stanford 6-3, 6-4 in straight sets.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #F3F3F3; border-radius: 14px; padding: 20px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.06); transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.10); } .ds-card-eyebrow { margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2.5px; color: #AAAAAA; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 6px 0; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: -0.4px; color: #0D0D0D; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.5; color: #525252; }

components.name: Section Eyebrow
components.description: Signature pattern: 10px uppercase eyebrow + 12px gap + 1px hairline rule, optionally with right-aligned action.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-eyebrow-label { white-space: nowrap; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2.5px; color: #AAAAAA; } .ds-eyebrow-rule { flex: 1; height: 1px; background: #F3F3F3; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item (Active)
components.description: Active state of the dashboard sidebar nav item. Soft blue tint, blue label and icon.
components.html: Profile
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; height: 36px; padding: 0 14px 0 13px; background: #EBF2FD; color: #3B82F6; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 200ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #E1ECFB; } .ds-nav-icon { color: #3B82F6; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-nav-label { line-height: 1; }

components.name: Status Badge (Win)
components.description: Match outcome pill. Win Green tint with Win Green text.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 6px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.3px; line-height: 1; } .ds-badge--win { background: rgba(115,230,104,0.15); color: #5DB955; }

components.name: Status Badge (Loss)
components.description: Match outcome pill. Loss Red tint with Loss Red text.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 6px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.3px; line-height: 1; } .ds-badge--loss { background: rgba(229,24,55,0.15); color: #E51837; }

components.name: Keyboard Shortcut Chip
components.description: Inline keyboard hint. Auto-sizes to text + padding so glyphs sit at their natural cap height.
components.css: .ds-kbd { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 4px; background: #F0F0F0; color: #AAAAAA; border-radius: 3px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; }

narrative.overview: Advantage Analytics is a competitor's tool, not a consumer app. The interface is the equivalent of a high-performance training room: clean walls, exact equipment, no decoration. Numbers breathe. Type is light. Lines are hairline. The accent is one shade of blue, used only when the screen needs to issue a command or claim a win. Nothing else fights for attention because there's nothing else to say. The system is monochrome with a single chromatic voice. Cool neutrals carry every surface, every divider, every body word. Signal Blue carries action and emphasis only. Win Green and Loss Red carry match outcome and nothing else. Color is functional, never decorative.
keyCharacteristics: Light mode only, cool-neutral palette, single accent.
Light (300) for hero numbers; medium (500) for eyebrows; semibold (600) for stat values; bold (700) reserved for match scores.
Hairline #F3F3F3 rules carry hierarchy more than borders or shadows do.
Two motion curves only, both ease-out exponential. No bounce, no elastic.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Signal Blue carries no more than 10% of any screen. The page may have one CTA, one active nav highlight, one focus ring at a time. If two blue elements compete on the same surface, one of them is wrong.

rules.name: The Outcome-Only Rule
rules.body: Green means winning; red means losing. They never appear as mood, status, or affirmation.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy comes from #F3F3F3 rules and whitespace, not from borders or shadows. If a section needs a card to feel real, the structure is wrong: simplify the page, not the chrome.

rules.name: The Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Every section opens with a 10px font-medium uppercase tracking-2.5px text-#AAAAAA eyebrow followed by a hairline rule. Non-negotiable; this is the typographic spine of the product.

rules.name: The Tabular Rule
rules.body: Any number a player will compare against another number gets tabular-nums. If columns of numbers are not aligned, the system has lost.

rules.name: The 65-75ch Rule
rules.body: Body copy never extends past 75 characters per line.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards begin flat. Shadow is added only when the surface needs to claim attention. Never as default decoration.

rules.name: The No-Layered-Cards Rule
rules.body: Cards inside cards are forbidden. Use a hairline rule and whitespace, not a second card.

dos: Do lead every section with a 10px uppercase eyebrow + hairline rule.
Do use tabular-nums on every number a player will read alongside another number.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: skip transforms, keep opacity.
Do use Signal Blue exclusively for action and emphasis, on no more than 10% of the screen.
Do use Win Green for winning and Loss Red for losing only.
Do prefer underline inputs over boxed inputs.
Do keep cards flat at rest. Promote to shadow-card-emphasis only on hover, selection, or active state.
Do size icons at size-3.5 with strokeWidth=1.5. Lucide only.
donts: Don't use bounce or elastic animations.
Don't apply glassmorphism or backdrop blur as decoration.
Don't use neon accents, gradient text, or gradient-heavy surfaces.
Don't use warm tones, browns, or earthy colors anywhere.
Don't ship gamification: no streak meters, no achievement badges, no celebratory confetti.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe.
Don't invent decoration colors. The palette is closed.
Don't use emoji as icons. Lucide only.
Don't apply font weights other than 300, 400, 500, 600, 700.
Don't use SwingVision as a visual reference.
